display_name.description: Human-friendly name shown for the OAuth client.
display_name.rationale: Clear, production-ready names reduce user confusion on the consent screen and avoid test/generic labels.

brand.description: Identifier of the brand this client attaches to. Format: "projects/{project_number}/brands/{brand_id}".
brand.rationale: Ensures the client is tied to the intended brand/project; a wrong or malformed brand can point consent to the wrong tenant.
brand.non-compliant: brand = "projects/my-project/brands/12345" (uses project ID, not number) / "12345" (missing prefix) / "projects/123456789012/brands/" (empty brand_id)
